sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102570" key="tauroke/falos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταυρο-κέφᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n102570.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bull-headed</tr_>, of Bootes, Teucer in Boll <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Sphaera</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
